T0040.title: Anti-Collection
T0040.definition: Illicit tactics employed by underground operations to evade debt obligations, including fabricating documentation, malicious debt avoidance, and filing fraudulent lawsuits.
T0040.description: Illicit tactics employed by underground operations to evade debt obligations, including fabricating documentation, malicious debt avoidance, and filing fraudulent lawsuits.
T0040.usageExample: 我找了法务做反催收，他们让我把电话都转接给他们，说能帮我停息挂账，结果收了钱就拉黑我了。
